pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: RUS 0.37s/lap slower on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: RUS -1 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: RUS tyres degrade 0.133s/lap more on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 50 vs 49 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 3 (759-1161 m): 0.207 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~16 m later than RUS (entry); RUS carries ~4 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).

Sector 11 (3736-4223 m): 0.153 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~6 m later than RUS (entry); ANT carries ~5 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner); RUS gets to full throttle ~36 m sooner (exit).
Sector 1 (0-395 m): 0.143 s to RUS [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~70 m later than RUS (entry); RUS carries ~23 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).

where.headline: RUS gained in 10 of 14 micro-sectors
